title: Treasure Map
entries: The map starts at the {table:gm/loot/map-start}. {table:gm/loot/map-leg-1} until you find the {table:gm/loot/map-marker-1}. Then {table:gm/loot/map-leg-2} until you find {table:gm/loot/map-marker-2}. Lastly {table:gm/loot/map-leg-3} — and you will find the treasure {table:gm/loot/map-x}.
